rawAssistant: A healer such as myself can restore a full vitality to your party once more. Your Thornbeast and Gremlin are all refreshed, ready for whatever challenges lie ahead. Now, if I may remind you – with the recent rain, there's still soot on the wind from eastward. Make sure to keep that cloak dry, lest you risk a bit of ash in your lungs.
